ministries.name: strategy-ministry
ministries.purpose: Supreme planning, synthesis, constitution/spec decisions, final release judgment.
ministries.notes: Primary strategic minister. Not a fallback target.

ministries.name: operations-ministry
ministries.purpose: Operational chat, user-facing workflow checks, quick execution review.
ministries.notes: Fastest reliable NVIDIA ministry model in recent checks.

ministries.name: signals-ministry
ministries.purpose: Risk signals, architecture review, policy gap detection, governance analysis.
ministries.notes: Good analysis model; keep timeout higher than operations.

ministries.name: audit-office
ministries.purpose: Long-horizon audit review, governance traceability, consistency checks.
ministries.notes: Initial 240s attempt timed out; retry returned in 172.297s. Ministry works but is slow and not launch-critical.

ministries.name: governance-office
ministries.purpose: Reasoning pass for governance contracts, edge cases, and implementation risks.
ministries.notes: Returned in 213.927s during ministry readiness test; not suitable for fast chat but usable for ministry-specific reasoning.

ministries.name: citizen-services
ministries.purpose: User-facing wording, office/document clarity, onboarding simplification.
ministries.notes: Use for language and documentation review only until behavior stabilizes.

ministries.name: research-and-space-planning
ministries.purpose: Research synthesis, long-horizon planning, space-planning posture review.

reserve_models.reason: Timed out even with extended pre-GitHub checks; must pass a future ministry readiness test before assignment.

test_policy.pre_github_release: Run one ministry-specific smoke/review prompt per assigned ministry model and record returned/timeout/error status.
test_policy.pass_condition: All launch_critical ministries must return. Non-critical ministries may be marked slow_healthy or experimental, but failures must be recorded honestly. No fallback substitution is allowed during the ministry test.
